shortDescription: A polished city apartment prepared for business stays, short lets and serviced accommodation enquiries.
fullDescription: KAVARO Executive City Apartment is presented as a premium short-stay and serviced accommodation option for professionals, visiting families and corporate guests who need a clean, well-positioned London base. The apartment is structured for future online booking, payment confirmation and guest verification workflows.
cancellationPolicy: Cancellation terms apply and are subject to confirmation before booking approval.

shortDescription: A business-friendly apartment concept for short stays, relocation support and professional travel.
fullDescription: KAVARO Business Stay Suite is designed for corporate visitors, consultants and guests who need a comfortable short-stay base with work-ready amenities. Availability and pricing are subject to confirmation until live booking and payment integrations are activated.
cancellationPolicy: Flexible cancellation can be reviewed before booking confirmation.

shortDescription: A family-ready serviced accommodation option for medium stays and relocation enquiries.
fullDescription: KAVARO Family Serviced Apartment supports family visits, relocation stays and longer rental enquiries. It is presented with a larger guest capacity and a practical amenity profile for guests who need comfort, space and flexible booking terms.
cancellationPolicy: Cancellation policy applies and may vary for long-stay enquiries.
